About Me

Turning Data Into
Meaningful Insights

I am a Statistics student at Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember (ITS) Surabaya, driven by a strong interest in data analysis and quantitative problem solving. My academic work spans social, environmental, and development research domains.

Equipped with expertise in descriptive and inferential statistics, data visualization, forecasting, and statistical modelling — applying them to create real, evidence-based impact.
